summary: Iteration 13 - Offline Game Files feature verification. All 4 game files are correctly served via /api/content/games/ endpoint and displayed in the Instructor Toolbox under 'Offline Game Files' tab. The fake '383 Q&A Cards' digital game card products have been REMOVED from QuickOrder page.

InstructorToolbox.js: offlineGameFiles array at lines 424-461 correctly defines all 4 files
InstructorToolbox.js: renderGamePacks() function at lines 463-541 renders download cards with data-testid attributes
QuickOrder.js: No '383 Q&A Cards' or 'Holiday 4Cs Game Cards (Digital)' products found - correctly removed

success_rate.backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed - all game files served correctly)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 game files displayed, fake products removed)
